testcase.name: test_01_get_inventory_settings

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing default_warehouse_id field assert 'default_warehouse_id' in {'allow_sale_without_stock': False, 'auto_deduct_on_payment': True, 'id': 'inventory_settings', 'updated_at': '2026-02-13T03:28:46.476260+00:00'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inventory_stock_control.py:38: in test_01_get_inventory_settings assert "default_warehouse_id" in data, "Missing default_warehouse_id field" E AssertionError: Missing default_warehouse_id field E assert 'default_warehouse_id' in {'allow_sale_without_stock': False, 'auto_deduct_on_payment': True, 'id': 'inventory_settings', 'updated_at': '2026-02-13T03:28:46.476260+00:00'}
